title: Lifesteal Core X
description: Lifesteal Core X delivers a complete competitive lifesteal experience with heart stealing, revive systems, combat control, anti-farm protection, and scalable MySQL storage for high-performance SMP servers.
body:
🩸 Lifesteal Core X

The Ultimate Lifesteal System for Competitive SMP Servers

A modern, high-performance and fully modular lifesteal plugin built exclusively for Paper servers.

--- # 🧠 Overview **Lifesteal Core X** is a powerful competitive SMP plugin designed for modern Minecraft servers. It includes a **complete lifesteal system, combat protection, anti-farm security, GUI menus, leaderboards, and MySQL support**. Perfect for: * SMP servers * PvP focused communities * Lifesteal survival networks * Competitive events --- # 🖼 Plugin Preview --- # 🚀 Why Lifesteal Core X? ✔ Modular architecture ✔ Optimized performance ✔ MySQL database support ✔ GUI based management ✔ Anti-farm protection ✔ Built-in combat system ✔ PlaceholderAPI support ✔ Leaderboards and stats ✔ Designed for large SMP servers --- # ❤️ Core Lifesteal System 🩸 Gain hearts when killing players 💀 Lose hearts when you die Additional features: * Configurable **minimum and maximum hearts** * Fully persistent player data * Supports **MySQL database storage** * Clean internal API for expansion * Stable system designed for long running SMP servers --- # 🛡 Advanced Combat System Prevent players from escaping fights. Features include: ⏱ Configurable combat timer 🚫 Block commands while in combat ⚠ Optional logout punishment ⚙ Toggle combat system on/off This ensures fair PvP gameplay. --- # 🚫 Anti-Farm Protection Stop players from abusing lifesteal mechanics. Protection features: 🔁 Kill cooldown tracking 🧠 Farm detection system 🌐 Same-IP kill protection ⚙ Fully configurable cooldown system Keeps progression fair for everyone. --- # 📊 Live Scoreboard System A lightweight real-time scoreboard displaying: ❤️ Hearts ⚔ Player kills 💀 Player deaths 📈 Kill / Death ratio Additional options: * Configurable refresh rate * Customizable layout * Compatible with scoreboard plugins --- # 🧾 Stats & GUI System Use the **main GUI interface** to view player statistics. Command: ``` /lifesteal ``` Features: 📊 Player statistics viewer 🏆 Top 10 leaderboard 🔄 Revive menu 🎯 Easy navigation system Designed for **clean and intuitive gameplay**. --- # 🔄 Revive System Revive eliminated players and bring them back into the game. Features: 💔 Revive dead or banned players ❤️ Configurable revive hearts 📢 Optional broadcast messages 🧩 GUI based revive menu 👑 Admin force revive command Perfect for lifesteal SMP mechanics. --- # 🗄 Database System Designed for scalability. 💾 MySQL database support 🛠 Automatic table creation ⚡ Optimized SQL queries 🔐 Secure database connection Works perfectly for **large multiplayer networks**. --- # 🔌 PlaceholderAPI Support Supported placeholders: ``` %lifesteal_hearts% %lifesteal_kills% %lifesteal_deaths% %lifesteal_kd% ``` Compatible with: * TAB * DeluxeScoreboard * Chat formatting plugins * Hologram plugins * Custom scoreboards --- # 📜 Commands ## 👤 Player Commands ``` /lifesteal /lifesteal stats /lifesteal leaderboard /lifesteal revive ``` Alias: ``` /ls ``` --- ## 👑 Admin Commands ``` /lsadmin set /lsadmin add /lsadmin remove /lsadmin revive /lsadmin reload ``` Permission: ``` lifesteal.admin ``` --- # ⚙ Configuration Fully customizable configuration files: ``` config.yml database.yml messages.yml gui.yml ``` You can configure: * Default hearts * Maximum hearts * Combat duration * Anti farm cooldown * Revive settings * GUI layout * Scoreboard design * Custom messages --- # 🛠 Requirements ✔ Paper 1.20+ ✔ Java 17+ ✔ PlaceholderAPI (recommended) --- # 📦 Installation 1. Drop the plugin jar into `/plugins/` 2. Start the server 3. Edit configuration files 4. Restart the server Done ✔ --- # 📌 Current Version **v1.0 — Initial Stable Release** --- # 👨‍💻 Developer **ArchitDev** Professional Paper Plugin Developer --- # 🗺 Roadmap Upcoming features planned for future updates: 🔄 Async MySQL saving 🌍 Bungee / Velocity support 🔴 Redis data sync ❤️ Custom heart items 🎖 Rank based bonuses 🎞 Animated scoreboard 📡 Cross server stats --- **Lifesteal Core X is just getting started 🚀**
